'''Pirdia''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] orbiting the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Tyrius/Legends|Tyrius]] in the [[Tyrius system/Legends|Tyrius system]]. Located in the [[Savareen sector/Legends|Savareen sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], it was a ringed [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] with green-blue gases striping its surface.<ref name="SEPG">''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''</ref>

==History==
In [[3638 BBY]], gas miners on Pirdia stumbled upon a long-abandoned fortress in the gas giant's [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]].<ref name="Mission" />

The moons of the planet were occasionally mined by [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] arms manufacturers.<ref name="SEPG" />

{{Planet-stub}}
